message:
So there I was, in the middle of a family outing, when my phone decided it was time to take a nap—right as I was about to pull up our emergency plan. I fumbled around, desperately hoping I'd at least saved it on a piece of paper somewhere. Spoiler alert: I hadn’t. 

After a few moments of panic, I remembered that my partner had a backup copy of our important documents and plans stashed in their bag. It made me realize how crucial it is to have both digital and physical backups, especially when technology can fail us at the worst possible times. 

Have you ever been caught off guard when your tech let you down? How do you keep your family prepared in those moments?
